diff: - Exposure limit: $500 million (of which, not more than $50 million from XAUM)
- Staked and wrapped versions: Tether XAUT, Paxos PAXG, Matrixdock XAUM
prTitle: SAEP-14: Update Offchain Collateralized Lending Artifact Section
summary: SAEP-14: Update Offchain Collateralized Lending Artifact Section
description: This proposal is submitted by Phoenix Labs in its role as a nested contributor, as defined in section A.6.1.1.1.2.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1 of the Spark Artifact. The proposal recommends that Spark governance update offchain collateralized lending parameters and details.
